title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 276.200 - Unlawful to discriminate
text:
276.200.  Unlawful to discriminate. — It is hereby declared unlawful for any person, firm or corporation maintaining any such public market to discriminate, in any manner whatever, against any person, firm or corporation buying, selling or exchanging poultry and eggs and other farm products at such public market.
(RSMo 1939 § 14402) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12744
